description:
A choose-your-own-path retelling of Hamlet by Ryan North (with William Shakespeare, and YOU). Play as Hamlet, Ophelia, or Hamlet's father, and steer the story down hundreds of branching paths — most of them gleefully off-script. Heavily illustrated (each ending drawn by a different guest artist) and very funny.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- Came out of a record-breaking Kickstarter; has a genuine cult following.
- Works as a party object — fun to read aloud and pass around.
- No prior Shakespeare knowledge needed; rewards it if you have it.
- Paperback, good condition.
name: To Be or Not To Be: A Chooseable-Path Adventure
